name: Python Algorithms Assembly
description: Assemble common algorithmic loop and pattern snippets in Python.

questions.question: Assemble a binary search midpoint calculation.
questions.explanation: Integer midpoint in Python uses floor division.

questions.question: Assemble the condition for binary search left half.
questions.explanation: Move to left half when midpoint value is greater.

questions.question: Assemble two-pointer initialization for a sorted array pair problem.
questions.explanation: Typical two-pointer setup starts at both ends.

questions.question: Assemble a sliding-window expansion step.
questions.explanation: Add incoming right element to the current window.

questions.question: Assemble a sliding-window shrink step.
questions.explanation: Subtract outgoing left element when shrinking window.

questions.question: Assemble recursive base case for factorial function.
Assemble recursive step for factorial function.
questions.explanation: Factorial recursion multiplies by previous factorial.

questions.question: Assemble dynamic-programming initialization for Fibonacci table.
questions.explanation: Seed Fibonacci DP with first two values.

questions.question: Assemble update step for running minimum.
questions.explanation: Update using built-in min each iteration.

questions.question: Assemble loop header for iterating array indices and values.
Assemble greedy interval selection condition.
questions.explanation: Take interval when it does not overlap previous end.

questions.question: Assemble swap statement used in sorting.
questions.explanation: Python tuple-unpacking swap is concise and idiomatic.

questions.question: Assemble a condition used in linear search success check.
Assemble code to push node into queue list for BFS.
questions.explanation: append is common when queue is represented as a list/deque append side.

questions.question: Assemble condition that ends binary search loop.
questions.explanation: Continue while search interval is valid.
